query: SELECT awayTeam, homeTeam, awayML, homeML, mlAwayBetsPct, mlAwayMoneyPct, spreadAwayBetsPct, totalOverBetsPct, gameDate FROM games WHERE sport = 'NCAAM' AND awayML IS NOT NULL ORDER BY gameDate, sortOrder LIMIT 8;
